title: Jamaican Pasta Bake
description: A creamy, cheesy pasta bake with a twist of Caribbean flavors. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
Add asparagus and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
In a separate saucepan, heat Jamaican xtra cheese sauce over low heat until warm and bubbly.
Combine cooked pasta, asparagus, and cheese sauce. Mix well to combine.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with additional cheese if desired.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
